message:
fix: use correct uds-tokenizer image tag in PPC guide (#829)

The tag v0.5.0-rc1 for ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-uds-tokenizer does not
exist (manifest unknown), causing ImagePullBackOff on the tokenizer-uds
sidecar container. This breaks the entire PPC (precise-prefix-cache-aware)
guide since the EPP depends on the tokenizer via UDS socket.

Available tags are: v0.5.0, v0.5.1-rc1, latest. Update to v0.5.1-rc1
which is the latest release candidate.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ inferenceExtension:
           key: HF_TOKEN
   sidecar:
     enabled: true
-    image: ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-uds-tokenizer:v0.5.0-rc1
+    image: ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-uds-tokenizer:v0.5.1-rc1
     imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
     name: tokenizer-uds
     # Both HF_HOME and TOKENIZERS_DIR are required to point to the same mounted directory

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ inferenceExtension:
           key: HF_TOKEN
   sidecar:
     enabled: true
-    image: ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-uds-tokenizer:v0.5.0-rc1
+    image: ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-uds-tokenizer:v0.5.1-rc1
     imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
     name: tokenizer-uds
     # Both HF_HOME and TOKENIZERS_DIR are required to point to the same mounted directory
